titleStmt.title: SII 9.239: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 239. (A.R. No. 521 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING IN A FIELD NEAR CHINNA-TUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 5th year of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), the cyclic year Dundubhi, Śrāvaṇa, puṇṇami, Ādivāra, Śoma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1142 August 8, Saturday, not Sunday, there having been a lunar eclipse on Saturday. The one hundred and forty Mahājanas of Tumbuḷa are said to have made a grant of some land for the service of the god Kēśavadēva, consecrated by Arasiyakka The record is a little damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvalla
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadē
kamalladēvavarṣada 5 neya duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada
śrāvaṇada puṇnami Ādivāradaṁdu sōmagraha
ṇanimittadiṁ śrīmatsarvva(ṁ)namasyadagrahāraṁ
tuṁbuḷadaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu nūṟanālvadiṁbarumi
rddu Arasiyakkaṁgaḷu māḍisida śrīkēśavadēvaraṁgabhō
gakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ biṭṭa dharmma Ūriṁ paḍuva
lu keṟeyēriya keḷage gadde kamma 100 Ī sōmēśvaradiṁ
mūḍalu gadde kamma 120 Alliṁ mūḍalu Āgnetōṭa ka 100 sarasugadde ka 60
satrada keyya teṁkalu haḷḷadi mūḍalu sāsigavāḍadiṁ
paḍuvalu kariyakeyi ma 4 Alli sarasvati
ge ma 1 dēvariṁ teṁkalu matta 1 nāgēśvaradēvaru
kēśavadēvargge būduhāḷalu biṭṭa keyi ma 3
koṁtanikeyalu matta 2 Agrahāraṁ tuṁbu
ḷadalu taṁbuligaruṁ dēsiyuṁ biṭṭa dharmmaṁ Ele
hēṟi 100 māṟida honnalu Āṁgi
Āḍa 10 meḷasu sāsasō 1 Ā stha
ḷadalu puṭṭida ponnalu suṁkaveggaḍegaḷu dasa
vaṁdavaṁ biṭṭaru . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmmasēturnnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanī
yō bhavadbhissarvvānētānu bhāginapārtthivēṁdrānbhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ © śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
